article_meta.title: Kayla Bartkowski / GettyMarjorie Taylor Greene Came So Close to Getting the JokeWhat the Georgia representative learned

reasoning: Classification direction is correct with strong signals, but the model leans on outlet reputation and provides mostly vague indicators rather than specific authorial phrases, weakening evidence quality.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Labeling as Left fits the clearly anti-right editorial framing across headlines; at worst it’s one notch stronger than Lean Left.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Evidence relies partly on outlet history and generic claims; few concrete authorial phrases are cited as indicators.
